headline: A Look At Extra Space Storage (EXR) Valuation As Shares Show Mixed Recent Performance
summary: Extra Space Storage stock: recent performance snapshot Extra Space Storage (EXR) has drawn investor attention after a mixed stretch, with the stock up around 1% over the past month but down about 6% over the past 3 months. Against that choppy share performance, the company reports revenue of US$3.48b and net income of US$942.35m. This gives investors a large, established self storage REIT to assess on both income stability and valuation grounds. See our latest analysis for Extra Space...
